ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Description of the outlook (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rain) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Description of the temperature (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Description of the humidity (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "wind" TEXT /* Description of the wind (e.g., Weak, Strong) */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation intensity (in mm/h) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "play_tennis" TEXT /* Decision on whether to play tennis (Yes/No) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the decision (between 0 and 1) */,
  "decision_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_decisions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tennis_clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tennis club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the tennis club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tennis club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the club */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the club */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tennis club the player belongs to */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Player's handicap */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Player's skill level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES tennis_clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "preferred_outlook" TEXT /* Player's preferred outlook */,
  "preferred_temperature" TEXT /* Player's preferred temperature */,
  "preferred_humidity" TEXT /* Player's preferred humidity */,
  "preferred_wind" TEXT /* Player's preferred wind */,
  "play_history" TEXT /* Historical play outcomes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_preferences_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tennis club */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "temperature_actual" REAL /* Actual temperature */,
  "humidity_actual" REAL /* Actual humidity */,
  "wind_speed_actual" REAL /* Actual wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES tennis_clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* The recommendation on whether to play tennis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (between 0 and 1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tennis club */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "temperature_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted temperature */,
  "humidity_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted humidity */,
  "wind_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES tennis_clubs ("club_id")
)
